# VS Code Snippets Guide

Frontloom includes VS Code snippets that generate code following Frontloom patterns. All snippets are prefixed with `fl-` so they're easy to find.

---

## Setup

### Option A: Copy to project (Recommended)

Copy the snippet file for your framework into your project's `.vscode/` folder:

```bash
mkdir -p .vscode

# Pick your framework
cp node_modules/frontloom/snippets/react.code-snippets .vscode/
cp node_modules/frontloom/snippets/vue.code-snippets .vscode/
cp node_modules/frontloom/snippets/svelte.code-snippets .vscode/
cp node_modules/frontloom/snippets/angular.code-snippets .vscode/
cp node_modules/frontloom/snippets/astro.code-snippets .vscode/
```

VS Code automatically picks up `.code-snippets` files in `.vscode/`.

### Option B: User-level snippets

To use across all projects, copy to your global snippets folder:

```bash
# macOS
cp node_modules/frontloom/snippets/react.code-snippets \
  ~/Library/Application\ Support/Code/User/snippets/frontloom-react.code-snippets

# Linux
cp node_modules/frontloom/snippets/react.code-snippets \
  ~/.config/Code/User/snippets/frontloom-react.code-snippets

# Windows
copy node_modules\frontloom\snippets\react.code-snippets ^
  %APPDATA%\Code\User\snippets\frontloom-react.code-snippets
```

---

## Usage

Type `fl-` in a file and VS Code will show all available Frontloom snippets. Use `Tab` to jump between placeholders.

---

## Available Snippets

### React (`react.code-snippets`)

| Prefix | Description |
|---|---|
| `fl-component` | Component with typed props |
| `fl-component-ref` | Component extending native element props |
| `fl-async-state` | Discriminated union for async state |
| `fl-error-boundary` | Error boundary with reset |
| `fl-states` | Complete loading/error/empty/data pattern |
| `fl-server-action` | Next.js Server Action with Zod validation |
| `fl-form-field` | Accessible form field with error handling |
| `fl-hook` | Custom hook pattern |
| `fl-schema` | Zod schema with inferred type |

### Vue (`vue.code-snippets`)

| Prefix | Description |
|---|---|
| `fl-component` | Component with script setup and typed props |
| `fl-component-emit` | Component with typed props and emits |
| `fl-model` | Component with defineModel |
| `fl-fetch` | Nuxt useFetch with complete UI states |
| `fl-composable` | Composable pattern |
| `fl-store` | Pinia store with Composition API |
| `fl-form-field` | Accessible form field for Vue |
| `fl-server-route` | Nuxt server route with Zod validation |

### Svelte (`svelte.code-snippets`)

| Prefix | Description |
|---|---|
| `fl-component` | Svelte 5 component with $props() |
| `fl-component-snippet` | Component with children snippet |
| `fl-state` | Runes: $state + $derived |
| `fl-load` | SvelteKit server load function |
| `fl-action` | SvelteKit form action with Zod |
| `fl-await` | Await block with all states |

### Angular (`angular.code-snippets`)

| Prefix | Description |
|---|---|
| `fl-component` | Standalone component with signals and OnPush |
| `fl-service` | Injectable service with signals |
| `fl-resource` | resource() for async data |
| `fl-states` | @switch for async resource states |
| `fl-defer` | @defer block with placeholder/loading/error |
| `fl-form` | Typed reactive form |

### Astro (`astro.code-snippets`)

| Prefix | Description |
|---|---|
| `fl-component` | Astro component with typed props |
| `fl-layout` | Layout with SEO metadata and View Transitions |
| `fl-island` | Framework island with client directive picker |
| `fl-collection` | Dynamic page from content collection |
| `fl-content-config` | Content collection config with Zod schema |

---

## Customization

Snippets are plain JSON. To add your own or modify existing ones, edit the `.code-snippets` file in your `.vscode/` folder.

```json
{
  "My Custom Snippet": {
    "scope": "typescriptreact",
    "prefix": "fl-my-pattern",
    "description": "My project-specific pattern",
    "body": [
      "// your code here",
      "${0}"
    ]
  }
}
```
